remarks: Discussed premium health insurance plan. Client showed strong interest in family coverage. Asked for detailed quote by Friday.
followUpNotes: Send premium comparison chart and schedule a follow-up call

remarks: Initial introduction call. Client was busy but agreed to a callback next week. Mentioned interest in comprehensive health plans.
followUpNotes: Call back regarding health insurance plans

remarks: Detailed discussion on term life insurance. Client wants 1CR cover. Sent proposal via email. Spouse also interested in separate policy.
followUpNotes: Follow up on proposal acceptance and spouse coverage

remarks: Client called asking about term vs whole life insurance options. Explained benefits of both. Client leaning towards term life.
followUpNotes: Prepare comparison document for term vs whole life

remarks: Motor insurance renewal discussion. Current policy expiring in 30 days. Offered comprehensive plan with 0-dep and engine protect add-ons.
followUpNotes: Check if client has reviewed the renewal quote

remarks: Attempted to reach client for initial discussion on workers compensation insurance. No answer after 3 rings.
followUpNotes: Try calling again during lunch hours

remarks: Final negotiation call. Client agreed to the premium amount. Policy documents to be issued. Payment received via NEFT. Excellent conversion!
followUpNotes: Send policy documents and welcome kit

remarks: Discussion about group health insurance for 25 employees. Client wants cashless hospital network list. Very promising lead.
followUpNotes: Share cashless hospital list and group insurance brochure

remarks: Client negotiating on premium. Wants 10% discount on annual premium. Discussed loyalty benefits and no-claim bonus structure.
followUpNotes: Check with underwriter on possible discount approval

remarks: First contact regarding motor insurance renewal. Client currently insured with competitor. Expressed interest in switching for better claim support.
Discussed cyber insurance for the company. Client runs a mid-size fintech firm. Interested in data breach and liability coverage.
followUpNotes: Send cyber insurance proposal with coverage details

remarks: Comprehensive health insurance discussion for family of 4. Client wants maternity coverage included. Sent 3 plan options via email.
followUpNotes: Follow up on plan selection and document submission

remarks: Deep dive into term life insurance requirements. Client wants rider for critical illness. Negotiating premium with 20-year term.
followUpNotes: Get revised quote from underwriting with CI rider

remarks: Workers compensation insurance inquiry. Company has 50+ employees in manufacturing. Needs coverage for workplace accidents and medical expenses.
followUpNotes: Site visit to assess workplace risk for premium calculation

remarks: Initial outreach for WC insurance. Client was in a meeting but asked to call back next week. Seems like a high-potential lead.
followUpNotes: Call back to discuss WC insurance requirements
